---
title: "Simplified Real-Data Model Workflow"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Chunk 1: Load one real day

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)

light <- read_csv(here("merged_fcb_data_2012", "E_data.csv"),
                  show_col_types = FALSE)
cells <- read_csv(here("merged_fcb_data_2012", "cells_size_dist_data.csv"),
                  show_col_types = FALSE)
volumes <- read_csv(here("merged_fcb_data_2012", "vol_bins.csv"),
                    show_col_types = FALSE)

light$date_time <- parse_date_time(
  light$date_time, c("ymd HMS", "ymd HM", "ymd"), tz = "UTC"
)
cells$date_time <- parse_date_time(
  cells$date_time, c("ymd HMS", "ymd HM", "ymd"), tz = "UTC"
)

light <- light |>
  filter(!is.na(date_time), !is.na(E)) |>
  group_by(date_time) |>
  summarise(E = mean(E), .groups = "drop")

size_columns <- paste0("w", 1:57)

cells <- cells |>
  filter(!is.na(date_time)) |>
  group_by(date_time) |>
  summarise(
    across(all_of(size_columns), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

test_start <- ymd_hms("2012-01-14 06:00:00", tz = "UTC")

cell_24 <- cells |>
  filter(date_time >= test_start,
         date_time <= test_start + hours(23)) |>
  arrange(date_time)

light_24 <- light |>
  filter(date_time >= test_start - hours(33),
         date_time <= test_start + hours(24)) |>
  arrange(date_time)

W_obs <- as.matrix(cell_24[, size_columns])
W_obs <- W_obs / rowSums(W_obs)

v_i <- volumes$v_i
m <- ncol(W_obs)
n_hours <- nrow(W_obs)
delta_v <- 0.125

stopifnot(n_hours == 24, m == 57, length(v_i) == 57)

dim(W_obs)
range(rowSums(W_obs))
```

## Chunk 2: Measured and kernel light

```{r}
light_model <- light_24 |>
  mutate(
    model_hour = as.numeric(
      difftime(date_time, test_start, units = "hours")
    )
  )

E_t <- function(t) {
  pmax(
    approx(
      light_model$model_hour,
      light_model$E,
      xout = t,
      method = "linear"
    )$y,
    0
  )
}

kernel_weights <- function(p, tau_max) {
  w <- p * (1 - p)^(0:tau_max)
  w / sum(w)
}

E_kernel <- function(t, p, tau_max) {
  tau <- 0:tau_max
  sum(kernel_weights(p, tau_max) *
        sapply(tau, function(x) E_t(t - x)))
}
```

## Chunk 3: Size-structured model

```{r}
gamma_t <- function(t, gamma_max, E_star,
                    model_type, p = NULL, tau_max = NULL) {
  E_use <- if (model_type == "instantaneous") {
    E_t(t)
  } else {
    E_kernel(t, p, tau_max)
  }

  gamma_max * (1 - exp(-E_use / E_star))
}

# No t < 6 restriction
delta_i_t <- function(delta_max, a, b) {
  delta_max * ((a * v_i)^b / (1 + (a * v_i)^b))
}

matrix_A <- function(t, gamma_max, delta_max, E_star, a, b,
                     model_type, p = NULL, tau_max = NULL) {
  A <- matrix(0, m, m)

  gamma <- gamma_t(
    t, gamma_max, E_star, model_type, p, tau_max
  )
  delta_i <- delta_i_t(delta_max, a, b)
  j <- as.integer(1 + 1 / delta_v)

  for (i in 1:(m - 1)) {
    A[i + 1, i] <- A[i + 1, i] +
      gamma * (1 - delta_i[i])
  }

  A[m, m] <- A[m, m] +
    gamma * (1 - delta_i[m])

  for (i in 2:(j - 1)) {
    A[1, i] <- A[1, i] + 2 * delta_i[i]
  }

  for (i in j:m) {
    A[i + 1 - j, i] <- A[i + 1 - j, i] +
      2 * delta_i[i]
  }

  A[1, 1] <- A[1, 1] +
    (1 - gamma) * (1 - delta_i[1]) +
    2 * delta_i[1]

  for (i in 2:(m - 1)) {
    A[i, i] <- A[i, i] +
      (1 - gamma) * (1 - delta_i[i])
  }

  A[m, m] <- A[m, m] +
    (1 - gamma) * (1 - delta_i[m])

  A
}

matrix_B <- function(t, gamma_max, delta_max, E_star, a, b,
                     model_type, p = NULL, tau_max = NULL) {
  B <- diag(m)

  for (k in 0:5) {
    A_k <- matrix_A(
      t + k / 6, gamma_max, delta_max, E_star, a, b,
      model_type, p, tau_max
    )
    B <- A_k %*% B
  }

  B
}

predict_model <- function(params, model_type, tau_max = 33) {
  W <- matrix(0, n_hours, m)
  W[1, ] <- W_obs[1, ]

  for (row in 1:(n_hours - 1)) {
    B <- matrix_B(
      row - 1,
      params["gamma_max"],
      params["delta_max"],
      params["E_star"],
      params["a"],
      params["b"],
      model_type,
      if (model_type == "kernel") params["p"] else NULL,
      tau_max
    )

    W[row + 1, ] <- B %*% W[row, ]
    W[row + 1, ] <- W[row + 1, ] / sum(W[row + 1, ])
  }

  W
}
```

## Chunk 4: Fit and compare

```{r}
fit_model <- function(model_type, tau_max = 33) {
  if (model_type == "instantaneous") {
    start <- c(gamma_max = 0.20, delta_max = 0.03,
               E_star = 500, a = 2, b = 2)
    lower <- c(0.001, 0.001, 10, 0.1, 0.1)
    upper <- c(0.5, 0.15, 5000, 30, 10)
  } else {
    start <- c(gamma_max = 0.20, delta_max = 0.03,
               E_star = 500, a = 2, b = 2, p = 0.90)
    lower <- c(0.001, 0.001, 10, 0.1, 0.1, 0.001)
    upper <- c(0.5, 0.15, 5000, 30, 10, 0.999)
  }

  objective <- function(x) {
    names(x) <- names(start)

    W_pred <- tryCatch(
      predict_model(x, model_type, tau_max),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(W_pred)) return(1e10)

    sum((W_obs[-1, ] - W_pred[-1, ])^2)
  }

  fit <- optim(
    start, objective,
    method = "L-BFGS-B",
    lower = lower,
    upper = upper,
    control = list(maxit = 1000)
  )

  n <- (n_hours - 1) * (m - 1)
  k <- length(start)

  list(
    parameters = fit$par,
    SSE = fit$value,
    Penalized_SSQ = fit$value / (n - 2 * k),
    convergence = fit$convergence
  )
}

instantaneous_fit <- fit_model("instantaneous")
kernel_fit <- fit_model("kernel", tau_max = 33)

comparison <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Instantaneous", "Kernel"),
  SSE = c(instantaneous_fit$SSE, kernel_fit$SSE),
  Penalized_SSQ = c(
    instantaneous_fit$Penalized_SSQ,
    kernel_fit$Penalized_SSQ
  ),
  Convergence = c(
    instantaneous_fit$convergence,
    kernel_fit$convergence
  )
) |>
  arrange(Penalized_SSQ)

instantaneous_fit$parameters
kernel_fit$parameters
comparison
```

## Chunk 5: Two SSE grid plots

```{r}
center <- instantaneous_fit$parameters

make_surface <- function(param1, values1, param2, values2) {
  grid <- expand.grid(
    Param1Value = values1,
    Param2Value = values2
  )

  grid$SSE <- apply(grid, 1, function(x) {
    test <- center
    test[param1] <- x[1]
    test[param2] <- x[2]

    W_pred <- predict_model(
      test,
      model_type = "instantaneous"
    )

    sum((W_obs[-1, ] - W_pred[-1, ])^2)
  })

  grid$Log10SSE <- log10(grid$SSE)

  ggplot(
    grid,
    aes(Param1Value, Param2Value, fill = Log10SSE)
  ) +
    geom_tile() +
    geom_point(
      data = data.frame(
        x = unname(center[param1]),
        y = unname(center[param2])
      ),
      aes(x, y),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      shape = 8,
      size = 4
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste(param1, "versus", param2),
      subtitle = "Black star = fitted parameter pair",
      x = param1,
      y = param2,
      fill = "log10(SSE)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

make_surface(
  "gamma_max", seq(0.08, 0.22, length.out = 15),
  "delta_max", seq(0.001, 0.015, length.out = 15)
)

make_surface(
  "a", seq(0.5, 2.0, length.out = 15),
  "b", seq(2, 9, length.out = 15)
)
```
